title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 30 - 2017: Roman Timeline & Timechart

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a long overnight work session building a Roman timeline and timechart project. He troubleshot column/formatting issues caused by styled text that had to be stripped through Notepad, fixed navigation links between horizontal and vertical sections of the timeline, and attached YouTube icons and phone links to a timechart he plans to use as a show playlist. He outlines next steps: cleaning up Wikipedia-sourced text and linking dates from his 'living' pages back to the timeline.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: styled text from an external source caused column layout to break; stripping it through Notepad fixed it
happy with progress attaching YouTube icons and phone links; excited about linking it to the timeline
